subtitle: Computer Engineering Student @ UT Arlington
headline: Full-Stack Developer | Software Engineer Intern | Undergraduate Research Assistant
bioMarkdown:
Hi, I'm Darun👋. I am a Computer Engineering student at the University of Texas at Arlington, passionate about building high-impact software solutions and exploring the intersections of finance and technology. 

My experience ranges from developing full-scale web applications at Adwealth and Ascend Web Agency to conducting large-scale code analysis as an Undergraduate Research Assistant. I'm currently working on advanced projects like an Adaptive PDE Solver for Option Pricing and an Algorithmic Trading Backtester.

🔬 **Interests:** Full-Stack Development, Algorithmic Trading, Financial Engineering, and Software Performance Optimization.
